upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAsmE diSaH pyAyante' (tE0 saM0 16114) prapyAyante=pravarDante samfDyanti samfdDimatyo Bavanti
'ApInAni DenUnAM srotAMsi saritAmiva' (hari0) ApInAni UDAMsi viSezyerTe viSezaRaprayogaH
'aBi svena payasA pIpyAnAH' (f0 7366) aBipIpyAnAH=aBito vfdDAH kAnaci rUpam liqyaNoSceti pIBAve dvitve hrasve tujAdInAM dIrGo'ByAsasyeti dIrGaH
